Name: Phase 1 - MVP DTC Funnel (Jun 1 - Aug 14, 2026)
Description: Live consumer funnel for the 149 wellness assessment -> BHN consult -> primary-care handoff, PCI SAQ-A compliant. Go-live Aug 14. No PHI on the web tier; everything sits behind the signed-token redirect.

Name: Funnel technical architecture + data-model plan
Description: FIRST agentic dev task. Produce the technical spec: Next 16 App Router app structure; Drizzle schema for account/consent/payment/audit-log; the signed-token handoff seam contract; Stripe SAQ-A (PCI) boundary; env/secrets; GA4/HubSpot/Resend integration points. Output: architecture decision doc + schema draft. No PHI on web tier.

Name: Monorepo scaffold + CI
Description: Next.js 16 App Router, TS, Tailwind 4, ESLint, test runner, Vercel project link, base CI.

Name: Provision infra accounts (Neon BAA, Resend, Stripe)
Description: Neon Postgres Scale tier + BAA, Resend, Stripe account provisioning. Activation task (invoice 1A).

Name: Drizzle schema + migrations baseline + DB connection
Description: Implement the schema from F0; migration tooling; typed DB client; audit-log table.

Name: Env/secrets + Vercel linking + audit-log write scaffolding
Description: Secrets management, env per environment, audit-log write path skeleton on payment events.

Name: Discovery kickoff with David (founder)
Description: Scope confirmation, RFP synthesis into a decision doc rather than re-interviewing.

Name: Content/data inventory + analytics baseline
Description: Inventory existing copy/data; capture GA baseline.

Name: Signed-token handoff contract draft
Description: Co-authored with PBH product team + HIPAA specialist. Defines the redirect/token seam to the wellness app. Highest-stakes interface.

Name: Payment architecture spec (Stripe SAQ-A boundary)
Description: Define the cardholder-data boundary that keeps the funnel in SAQ-A scope. Feeds build + compliance docs.

Name: Discovery decision doc delivered (gate -> invoice 1B)
Description: End-of-discovery sign-off package. Unlocks architecture lock + invoice 1B.

Name: Source + onboard HIPAA/PCI specialist
Description: Subcontracted specialist; PBH approval rights on candidate. Sourcing Jun 1-15.

Name: PCI SAQ-A artifacts (diagram, inventory, questionnaire, AoC)
Description: Specialist authors SAQ-A artifacts. Boundary defined by payment implementation.

Name: Neon BAA execution
Description: Execute BAA with Neon for the DB tier.

Name: Pre-launch compliance sign-off
Description: Specialist architecture review + pre-launch sign-off. Gates go-live.

Name: Component-library extension from V1
Description: Extend the SOW#1 component library for the funnel surfaces.

Name: Landing page design
Description: Desktop + mobile in Figma.

Name: Signup / consent / payment surfaces - code-first (no Figma)
Description: Built code-first via Claude Code - NO Figma mockup. Page surrounds + all error/loading/success states authored directly in code (Mark / Tuily). Arian's only design input: the Stripe Appearance API tokens (brand values JSON) + design QA against staging. Per the Figma-vs-Code matrix, Section 3.

Name: Confirmation / handoff page - code-first (no Figma)
Description: Built code-first via Claude Code - NO Figma mockup. Receipt + next-steps + begin-assessment CTA + resume link + states authored in code (Mark / Tuily). Arian: design QA against staging only.

Name: Design sign-off (gate -> invoice 2)
Description: Funnel design signed off + architecture spec locked. Unlocks build + invoice 2.

Name: Build: Landing page
Description: Production landing page from DE2 on the scaffold.

Name: Build: Account creation + consent capture
Description: Account + versioned consent capture; writes to schema.

Name: Build: Stripe Payment Element + HSA/FSA
Description: Payment step inside SAQ-A boundary; HSA/FSA support.

Name: Build: Confirmation page
Description: Receipt + next-steps + begin-assessment CTA.

Name: Build: Signed-token handoff endpoint + redirect
Description: The redirect/token endpoint to the wellness app. Highest-stakes seam; elevated SLA post-launch.

Name: Build: GA4 events + measurement plan
Description: Funnel event instrumentation.

Name: Build: HubSpot lifecycle integration
Description: Lead/lifecycle sync to HubSpot.

Name: Build: Transactional email (Resend) + templates
Description: React Email + Resend; receipt + resume-link emails.

Name: Build: Webhook hardening + audit-log write path
Description: Stripe payment_succeeded/failed handlers; audit-log writes; idempotency.

Name: QA: E2E Playwright + live-mode payment + refund flow
Description: End-to-end suite incl. live-mode payment test and refund path.

Name: QA: webhook chaos + light load test
Description: Webhook failure injection; light load test.

Name: QA: WCAG 2.1 AA audit + Lighthouse
Description: axe + manual + screen reader; Lighthouse; email-rendering QA; real-device mobile.

Name: UAT
Description: User acceptance testing pass.

Name: MVP go-live (Aug 14)
Description: Gating commitment. Live funnel + PCI SAQ-A docs filed + WCAG statement.

Name: Hypercare (Aug 17-18)
Description: Two-day soft-launch hypercare; engineer on call; specialist on standby.

Name: IA workshop - funnel IA, navigation, page hierarchy
Description: Joint workshop with PBH + Mark + Matt. Lock funnel IA, navigation, page hierarchy. Output: IA decision doc with Arian's notes/sketches. Discovery-phase, Week 1.

Name: Cookie consent banner design (Figma)
Description: GDPR/CCPA banner: accept/decline/preferences. Copy treatment, button hierarchy, brand fit, mobile + desktop. 1 revision round.

Name: Footer rebuild design (Figma)
Description: Phase 1 footer: legal, compliance, contact, wellness-vs-medical statement, social. 2 revision rounds.

Name: Email templates design x4 (Figma)
Description: Responsive email design, 4 templates: receipt (HSA/FSA), abandonment 1h, abandonment 24h, resume link. Mobile + desktop. 2 revision rounds. Built code-first by Mark/Tuily from these.

Name: Stripe Appearance API tokens (brand values)
Description: JSON of Stripe Appearance tokens (colors, fonts, radius, spacing) so the Payment Element matches brand. Arian provides values; Mark wires into .22.

Name: Design QA during build (staging walkthroughs)
Description: Staging walkthroughs against Figma. Flag spacing/color/type/motion drift. Loom comments per page. Arian flags; Mark closes.
